    '; for(var k=0;k'+escapeHtml(it.options[k])+(k===it.correct?' ✓':'')+''; } html+='
'; wrap.innerHTML=html; els.questionListWrap.appendChild(wrap); } showScreen('list'); } function startPracticeCase(caseIndex){ var data=currentData(); if(!data || !data.practicalCases || !data.practicalCases.length) return; var c = (typeof caseIndex==='number' && caseIndex>=0 && caseIndex=state.sessionItems.length){ finishSession(); } else { renderQuestion(); } } catch(err){ console.error('Error al avanzar/finalizar la sesión:', err); alert('Ha ocurrido un error al finalizar el examen. Se han abierto detalles en la consola.'); } } function calculateExamScore(correct, wrong, total){ var T = total===30 ? 3 : (total===20 ? 4 : 6); var score=((correct-(wrong/T))/total)*10; if(score<0) score=0; return Math.round(score*100)/100; } function finishSession(){ var total=state.sessionItems.length, correct=0, wrong=0, blank=0, data=currentData()||{}, practicalCaseCount=Array.isArray(data.practicalCases)?data.practicalCases.length:0; for(var i=0;i'; html+='
'+escapeHtml(q.section||'')+(q.tag?' · '+escapeHtml(q.tag):'')+'
'; html+=buildReviewOptionsHtml(q, a && typeof a.selected==='number' ? a.selected : null, true); wrap.innerHTML=html; els.mistakesWrap.appendChild(wrap); } showScreen('results'); var duration=(new Date()).getTime()-state.sessionStartedAt; try{ updateProgress(state.subject.short, state.mode, {correct:correct, wrong:wrong, blank:blank, total:total, timeMs:duration, score:score, finishedAt:(new Date()).toISOString(), items:state.sessionItems, answers:state.answers}); } catch(err){ console.error('Error al guardar el progreso de la sesión:', err); } } function isFirebaseConfigured(){ return !!(window.firebase && FIREBASE_CONFIG && FIREBASE_CONFIG.apiKey && FIREBASE_CONFIG.apiKey.indexOf('PEGA_AQUI_')!==0); } function createAuthUi(){ var wrap=document.createElement('div'); wrap.id='authControls'; wrap.innerHTML=''; var toolbar=document.querySelector('.toolbar'); if(toolbar) toolbar.appendChild(wrap); els.authControls=wrap; els.authActionBtn=document.getElementById('authActionBtn'); } function updateAuthUi(){ if(!els.authActionBtn) return; document.body.classList.toggle('auth-logged-in', !!state.authUser); document.body.classList.toggle('auth-logged-out', !state.authUser); els.authActionBtn.className='btn small '+(state.authUser ? 'danger' : 'auth-login-btn'); els.authActionBtn.textContent=state.authUser ? 'Cerrar sesión' : 'Login'; if(state.authUser){ els.authActionBtn.title=state.authUser.displayName || state.authUser.email || 'Sesión iniciada'; }else if(!isFirebaseConfigured()){ els.authActionBtn.title='Configura Firebase para iniciar sesión'; }else{ els.authActionBtn.title='Entrar con Google'; } } function cloneData(obj){ return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj)); } function subjectDisplayShort(short){ return short==='Optativo' ? 'Eficacia energética' : short; } function subjectDisplayName(subject){ if(!subject) return ""; return subject.short==='Optativo' ? 'Eficacia energética y conectividad en edificación, infraestructuras y hogar inteligente' : (subject.name||""); } function subjectDisplayByShort(short){ for(var i=0;i=30) break; } return out; } function mergeProgressStores(localData, cloudData){ var merged={}; localData=ensureProgressShape(cloneData(localData||{})); cloudData=ensureProgressShape(cloneData(cloudData||{})); for(var i=0;ilr) && (!ll || cr>=ll)) pickCloud=true; else if(lr && (!cr || lr>cr) && (!cl || lr>=cl)) pickCloud=false; else if(cl && (!ll || cl>ll)) pickCloud=true; else if(ll===cl && subjectWeight(cs)>subjectWeight(ls)) pickCloud=true; var primary=pickCloud?cs:ls; var secondary=pickCloud?ls:cs; var pr=subjectResetAt(primary), sr=subjectResetAt(secondary), sl=subjectLastPlayed(secondary); merged[key]=cloneData(primary); if(!(pr && (!sr || pr>sr) && (!sl || pr>=sl))){ merged[key].weakQuestions=mergeWeakQuestions(primary.weakQuestions, secondary.weakQuestions); merged[key].history=mergeHistory(primary.history, secondary.history); merged[key].questionLog=((primary.questionLog||[]).concat(secondary.questionLog||[])).slice(0,2000); } } return ensureProgressShape(merged); } async function applyCloudProgress(user){ var localData=loadProgress(); var remoteData={}; try{ var snap=await db.collection('progress').doc(user.uid).get(); if(snap.exists){ var payload=snap.data()||{}; remoteData=payload.progress||{}; } }catch(e){} progressStore=mergeProgressStores(localData, remoteData); saveLocalProgress(); await saveProgressToCloud(true); renderAfterProgressRefresh(); } function renderAfterProgressRefresh(){ renderSubjects(); var progressScreen=document.getElementById('screen-progress'); if(progressScreen && progressScreen.classList.contains('active') && state.progressSubject){ renderProgress(); } if(document.getElementById('screen-list').classList.contains('active') && state.subject && state.mode){ renderQuestionListScreen(state.mode); } } async function signInWithGoogle(){ if(!isFirebaseConfigured()){ alert('Primero tienes que pegar la configuración de Firebase dentro del archivo HTML.'); return; } try{ var provider=new firebase.auth.GoogleAuthProvider(); provider.setCustomParameters({prompt:'select_account'}); var result=await auth.signInWithPopup(provider); if(result && result.user){ state.authUser=result.user; updateAuthUi(); } }catch(e){ alert('No se pudo iniciar sesión con Google.'); } } async function signOutGoogle(){ if(!auth) return; var ok=window.confirm('¿Quieres cerrar la sesión de Google en esta app?'); if(!ok) return; try{ await saveProgressToCloud(true); }catch(e){} try{ await auth.signOut(); state.authUser=null; updateAuthUi(); alert('Sesión cerrada correctamente.'); }catch(e2){ alert('No se pudo cerrar la sesión.'); } } function setupFirebase(){ if(!isFirebaseConfigured()) return; try{ firebaseApp = firebase.apps && firebase.apps.length ? firebase.app() : firebase.initializeApp(FIREBASE_CONFIG); auth = firebase.auth(); db = firebase.firestore(); window.auth = auth; window.db = db; state.cloudEnabled=true; auth.onAuthStateChanged(function(user){ authReady=true; state.authUser=user||null; updateAuthUi(); if(user){ try{ db.collection('users').doc(user.uid).set({ email:user.email||'', displayName:user.displayName||user.email||'Sin nombre', photoURL:user.photoURL||'', lastActive:new Date().toISOString() },{merge:true}); }catch(metaErr){} applyCloudProgress(user); } else{ progressStore=loadProgress(); renderAfterProgressRefresh(); } }); }catch(e){ state.cloudEnabled=false; window.auth = null; window.db = null; updateAuthUi(); } } function emptyMode(){ return {sessions:0, answered:0, correct:0, wrong:0, blank:0, totalTimeMs:0, totalScore:0, bestScore:null, lastScore:null}; } function emptySubject(){ return { overall:{sessions:0, answered:0, correct:0, wrong:0, blank:0, totalTimeMs:0, days:{}, lastPlayed:null, resetAt:null}, modes:{cuestionario:emptyMode(), practicas:emptyMode(), examen:emptyMode(), examen1:emptyMode(), examenTotal:emptyMode()}, history:[], weakQuestions:{}, questionLog:[] }; } function loadProgress(){ var raw=''; try{ raw=localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY)||''; }catch(e){} var obj={}; if(raw){ try{ obj=JSON.parse(raw); }catch(e2){ obj={}; } } return ensureProgressShape(obj); } function saveProgress(){ saveLocalProgress(); saveProgressToCloud(false); } function resetSubjectProgress(subjectShort){ if(!subjectShort) return; var label=subjectShort; var ok=window.confirm('¿Quieres borrar todo el registro de la asignatura '+label+'? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.'); if(!ok) return; var cleared=emptySubject(); cleared.overall.resetAt=(new Date()).toISOString(); progressStore[subjectShort]=cleared; saveProgress(); if(state.progressSubject===subjectShort){ renderProgress(); } if(state.subject && state.subject.short===subjectShort){ renderModeMenu(); } alert('Registro borrado correctamente para '+label+'.'); } function updateProgress(subjectShort, mode, entry){ var sub=progressStore[subjectShort] || emptySubject(); progressStore[subjectShort]=sub; var ov=sub.overall, md=sub.modes[mode] || emptyMode(); sub.modes[mode]=md; var answered=entry.correct+entry.wrong; ov.sessions++; ov.answered+=answered; ov.correct+=entry.correct; ov.wrong+=entry.wrong; ov.blank+=entry.blank; ov.totalTimeMs+=entry.timeMs||0; ov.lastPlayed=entry.finishedAt; ov.resetAt=null; var dayKey=(entry.finishedAt||'').slice(0,10); if(dayKey) ov.days[dayKey]=1; md.sessions++; md.answered+=answered; md.correct+=entry.correct; md.wrong+=entry.wrong; md.blank+=entry.blank; md.totalTimeMs+=entry.timeMs||0; if(typeof entry.score==='number'){ md.totalScore+=entry.score; md.lastScore=entry.score; md.bestScore=(md.bestScore===null)?entry.score:Math.max(md.bestScore,entry.score); } sub.history.unshift({mode:mode, correct:entry.correct, wrong:entry.wrong, blank:entry.blank, total:entry.total, score:entry.score, finishedAt:entry.finishedAt, percent: answered?Math.round(entry.correct/answered*1000)/10:0}); if(sub.history.length>30) sub.history=sub.history.slice(0,30); if(!Array.isArray(sub.questionLog)) sub.questionLog=[]; for(var i=0;i2000) sub.questionLog=sub.questionLog.slice(0,2000); saveProgress(); } var progressChartMetric='nota'; function formatTimeHuman(ms){ var mins=Math.round((ms||0)/60000); if(mins<60) return mins+' min'; var h=Math.floor(mins/60), m=mins%60; return h+'h '+(m<10?'0':'')+m+'m'; } function computeStreak(sub){ if(!sub||!sub.overall) return 0; var days=sub.overall.days||{}; var keys=Object.keys(days).sort(); if(!keys.length) return 0; var today=new Date(); var streak=0; for(var i=0;i<370;i++){ var d=new Date(today); d.setDate(today.getDate()-i); var k=d.toISOString().slice(0,10); if(days[k]){ streak++; } else { if(i===0){ continue; } break; } } return streak; } function progressRel(iso){ if(!iso) return 'nunca'; var d=new Date(iso), diff=Date.now()-d.getTime(); if(diff<60000) return 'ahora mismo'; if(diff<3600000) return 'hace '+Math.floor(diff/60000)+' min'; var now=new Date(), today=new Date(now.getFullYear(),now.getMonth(),now.getDate()); var dd=new Date(d.getFullYear(),d.getMonth(),d.getDate()); var dayDiff=Math.round((today-dd)/86400000); var hm=d.toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}); if(dayDiff===0) return 'hoy '+hm; if(dayDiff===1) return 'ayer '+hm; if(dayDiff<7) return 'hace '+dayDiff+' días'; return d.toLocaleDateString('es-ES',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit'})+' '+hm; } function getExamModesForSubject(short){ return getModeKeysForSubject(short).filter(isExamMode); } function getScoresForExamMode(sub, mode){ var out=[]; var hist=(sub&&sub.history)||[]; for(var i=0;i'; } el.innerHTML=html; var btns=el.querySelectorAll('.subj-item'); for(var j=0;j% Acierto'+acc.toFixed(1)+'%' +'
% Fallo'+fail.toFixed(1)+'%
' +'
Sesiones'+(ov.sessions||0)+'
' +'
Preguntas'+(ov.answered||0)+'
' +'
Tiempo total'+formatTimeHuman(ov.totalTimeMs||0)+'
' +'
Días activo'+Object.keys(ov.days||{}).length+'
'; var el=document.getElementById('progressKpiList'); if(el) el.innerHTML=html; var streak=computeStreak(sub); var sv=document.getElementById('progressStreakValue'); if(sv) sv.textContent=streak+' día'+(streak===1?'':'s'); } function buildSparklineSvg(points, yMin, yMax){ if(!points.length) return ''; var w=400, h=100, pad=10; var n=points.length; var xs=points.map(function(p,i){ return n===1?w/2:pad+(w-2*pad)*i/(n-1); }); var ys=points.map(function(p){ var t=(p-yMin)/(yMax-yMin||1); return h-pad-t*(h-2*pad); }); var pts=xs.map(function(x,i){ return x.toFixed(1)+','+ys[i].toFixed(1); }).join(' '); var poly=xs.map(function(x,i){ return x.toFixed(1)+','+ys[i].toFixed(1); }).join(' ')+' '+xs[xs.length-1].toFixed(1)+','+h+' '+xs[0].toFixed(1)+','+h; var last=''; return ''; } function buildBarsSvg(values, yMax){ var w=400, h=100, pad=6; var n=values.length; if(!n) return ''; var bw=(w-2*pad)/n; var inner=bw*0.7, gap=(bw-inner)/2; var out=''; return out; } function renderProgressSparkline(sub){ var el=document.getElementById('progressSparkline'); if(!el) return; var metric=progressChartMetric; var hist=(sub&&sub.history)||[]; el.classList.remove('line-mode'); if(metric==='nota'){ el.classList.add('line-mode'); var scores=[]; for(var i=hist.length-1;i>=0;i--){ var h=hist[i]||{}; if(typeof h.score==='number' && isExamMode(h.mode)) scores.push(h.score); } scores=scores.slice(-15); if(!scores.length){ el.innerHTML='
Sin notas de examen todavía
'; return; } var best=Math.max.apply(null, scores); el.innerHTML='10mejor '+best.toFixed(1)+'0'+buildSparklineSvg(scores, 0, 10); } else if(metric==='acierto'){ el.classList.add('line-mode'); var pcts=[]; for(var j=hist.length-1;j>=0;j--){ var hh=hist[j]||{}; if(typeof hh.percent==='number') pcts.push(hh.percent); } pcts=pcts.slice(-15); if(!pcts.length){ el.innerHTML='
Sin sesiones registradas
'; return; } var bestP=Math.max.apply(null, pcts); el.innerHTML='100%mejor '+bestP.toFixed(0)+'%0%'+buildSparklineSvg(pcts, 0, 100); } else { /* Sesiones/día — últimos 7 días */ var DAY_LETTERS=['D','L','M','X','J','V','S']; /* getDay(): 0=dom ... 6=sab */ var DAY_NAMES=['dom','lun','mar','mié','jue','vie','sáb']; var MONTH_ABBR=['ene','feb','mar','abr','may','jun','jul','ago','sep','oct','nov','dic']; var today=new Date(); today.setHours(12,0,0,0); function localKey(d){ var y=d.getFullYear(), m=String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'), dd=String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0'); return y+'-'+m+'-'+dd; } var days=[]; for(var d=6;d>=0;d--){ var dt=new Date(today); dt.setDate(today.getDate()-d); days.push(dt); } var counts={}; for(var p=0;p'; return; } var mx=Math.max.apply(null, vals)||1; var barsHtml=''; var labelsHtml=''; for(var q=0;q0 ? 'bar today' : (v===0 ? 'bar zero' : 'bar'); var barStyle=v>0 ? ' style="height:'+heightPct.toFixed(1)+'%"' : ''; var valStr=v>0 ? String(v) : ' '; var tipTxt=DAY_NAMES[day.getDay()]+' '+day.getDate()+'/'+(day.getMonth()+1)+' · '+v+' '+(v===1?'sesión':'sesiones'); barsHtml+='
'+valStr+'
'+(isToday?''+tipTxt+'':tipTxt)+'
'; var letter=DAY_LETTERS[day.getDay()]; labelsHtml+=''+letter+''; } var firstDay=days[0], lastDay=days[6]; var rangeTxt2; if(firstDay.getMonth()===lastDay.getMonth()){ rangeTxt2=firstDay.getDate()+' – '+lastDay.getDate()+' '+MONTH_ABBR[lastDay.getMonth()]+' '+lastDay.getFullYear(); } else { rangeTxt2=firstDay.getDate()+' '+MONTH_ABBR[firstDay.getMonth()]+' – '+lastDay.getDate()+' '+MONTH_ABBR[lastDay.getMonth()]+' '+lastDay.getFullYear(); } el.innerHTML='
máx '+mx+'
'+barsHtml+'
'+labelsHtml+'
'+rangeTxt2+'
'; } } function renderProgressExamTable(sub, short){ var body=document.getElementById('progressExamTableBody'); if(!body) return; var modes=getExamModesForSubject(short); var html=''; var any=false; for(var i=0;i0){ any=true; var last3=scores.slice(0,3).reverse(); // oldest-first for display, newest on right var lastHtml=last3.map(function(s){ return ''+s.toFixed(1)+''; }).join(''); html+=''+escapeHtml(label)+''+stats.sessions+''+(typeof stats.bestScore==='number'?stats.bestScore.toFixed(1):'-')+''+(typeof stats.avgScore==='number'?stats.avgScore.toFixed(1):'-')+''+(lastHtml||'-')+''; } else { html+=''+escapeHtml(label)+'Sin intentos aún'; } } if(!modes.length){ html='Esta asignatura no tiene exámenes.'; } body.innerHTML=html; } function renderProgressFreeStudy(sub, short){ var el=document.getElementById('progressFreeStudy'); if(!el) return; var modeKeys=getModeKeysForSubject(short).filter(function(m){ return m==='cuestionario' || m==='practicas'; }); if(!modeKeys.length){ el.innerHTML='
Sin modos de estudio libre en esta asignatura.
'; return; } var html=''; for(var i=0;i'+(m.sessions||0)+' sesiones · '+a.toFixed(0)+'% acierto · '+(m.answered||0)+' preguntas'; } el.innerHTML=html; } function progressModePillLabel(mode){ var meta=(isExamMode(mode))?getExamModeMeta(mode):null; if(meta) return meta.title; if(mode==='cuestionario') return 'Cuestionario'; if(mode==='practicas') return 'Prácticas'; return mode||'—'; } function renderProgressLastSessions(sub){ var el=document.getElementById('progressLastSessions'); if(!el) return; var hist=(sub.history||[]).slice(0,8); if(!hist.length){ el.innerHTML='
No hay sesiones registradas todavía.
'; return; } var html=''; for(var i=0;i'+mid+''+escapeHtml(progressRel(h.finishedAt))+''; } el.innerHTML=html; } function renderProgress(){ var avail=getAvailableSubjects(); if(!state.progressSubject || !SUBJECT_DATA[state.progressSubject]){ state.progressSubject=(state.subject && state.subject.short) ? state.subject.short : (avail[0] ? avail[0].short : 'PIICT'); } showScreen('progress'); var short=state.progressSubject; if(!progressStore[short]) progressStore[short]=emptySubject(); var sub=progressStore[short]; var ov=sub.overall; if(els.progressLastPlayed){ els.progressLastPlayed.textContent=subjectDisplayByShort(short)+' · última actividad: '+(ov.lastPlayed?progressRel(ov.lastPlayed):'sin actividad'); } renderProgressSubjectList(); renderProgressKpi(sub); renderProgressSparkline(sub); renderProgressExamTable(sub, short); renderProgressFreeStudy(sub, short); renderProgressLastSessions(sub); // keep legacy hidden nodes harmlessly updated var ls=document.getElementById('overallSessions'); if(ls) ls.textContent=String(ov.sessions||0); } function bindProgressChartChips(){ var wrap=document.getElementById('progressChartChips'); if(!wrap || wrap.__bound) return; wrap.__bound=1; wrap.addEventListener('click', function(ev){ var b=ev.target.closest('.r-chip'); if(!b) return; var m=b.getAttribute('data-metric'); if(!m) return; progressChartMetric=m; var chips=wrap.querySelectorAll('.r-chip'); for(var i=0;i0) arr.push(map[k]); } arr.sort(function(a,b){ return (b.wrong||0)-(a.wrong||0); }); if(!arr.length){ els.weakQuestionsList.innerHTML='
Aún no hay preguntas falladas registradas.
'; return 0; } var data=currentData()||{}; var lookup=buildQuestionLookups(data); for(var i=0;i
'+it.wrong+' fallos · '+escapeHtml(it.section||'')+(it.tag?' · '+escapeHtml(it.tag):'')+'
'; html+=buildReviewOptionsHtml(full, null, false); row.innerHTML=html; els.weakQuestionsList.appendChild(row); } return arr.length; } function renderWeakScreen(){ if(!state.subject) return; var short=state.subject.short; var sub=progressStore[short] || emptySubject(); progressStore[short]=sub; els.weakSubjectTitle.textContent=subjectDisplayName(state.subject); var totalWeak=renderWeak(sub); els.weakCountInfo.textContent=totalWeak ? ('Mostrando '+Math.min(10,totalWeak)+' preguntas con más fallos.') : 'Aún no hay preguntas falladas registradas en esta asignatura.'; showScreen('weak'); } function renderProgressSwitch(){ /* legacy no-op (new UI uses renderProgressSubjectList) */ } function getAvailableSubjects(){ var out=[]; for(var i=0;i'+escapeHtml(subjectDisplayShort(s.short))+''; } el.innerHTML=html; var btns=el.querySelectorAll('.share-chip'); for(var j=0;j
'; for(var k=0;k '+escapeHtml(it.label)+''; } html+='
'; } wrap.innerHTML=html; var boxes=wrap.querySelectorAll('input[type=checkbox][data-share-key]'); for(var b=0;b/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"'); } function resetHome(){ state.subject=null; state.mode=null; state.sessionItems=[]; state.answers=[]; state.currentIndex=0; state.selectedPracticeCaseIndex=null; hidePracticePicker(); renderSubjects(); showScreen('home'); } function backSubject(){ hidePracticePicker(); if(state.subject){ renderModeMenu(); showScreen('menu'); } else resetHome(); } function toggleTheme(){ var isDark=document.body.classList.contains('dark'); document.body.classList.toggle('dark',!isDark); if(document.documentElement) document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark',!isDark); try{ localStorage.setItem('tsei_theme',isDark?'light':'dark'); }catch(e){} updateThemeFabIcon(); } function getExamCountdownTarget(){ return new Date('2026-05-10T09:00:00+02:00'); } var examCountdownTimer=null; function updateExamCountdown(){ var wrap=document.getElementById('examCountdown'); var daysEl=document.getElementById('examCountdownDays'); var hoursEl=document.getElementById('examCountdownHours'); var minutesEl=document.getElementById('examCountdownMinutes'); var statusEl=document.getElementById('examCountdownStatus'); if(!wrap || !daysEl || !hoursEl || !minutesEl) return; var diff=getExamCountdownTarget().getTime()-Date.now(); if(diff<=0){ daysEl.textContent='0'; hoursEl.textContent='00'; minutesEl.textContent='00'; if(statusEl) statusEl.textContent='Los exámenes ya han empezado. Mucha mierda 🍀'; wrap.classList.add('is-live'); return; } wrap.classList.remove('is-live'); var totalMinutes=Math.floor(diff/60000); var days=Math.floor(totalMinutes/(60*24)); var hours=Math.floor((totalMinutes%(60*24))/60); var minutes=totalMinutes%60; daysEl.textContent=String(days); hoursEl.textContent=String(hours).padStart(2,'0'); minutesEl.textContent=String(minutes).padStart(2,'0'); if(statusEl) statusEl.textContent='Faltan '+days+' día'+(days===1?'':'s')+', '+hours+' hora'+(hours===1?'':'s')+' y '+minutes+' minuto'+(minutes===1?'':'s')+'.'; } function initExamCountdown(){ updateExamCountdown(); if(examCountdownTimer) clearInterval(examCountdownTimer); examCountdownTimer=setInterval(updateExamCountdown,1000); } function init(){ createAuthUi(); updateAuthUi(); setupFirebase(); applySavedTheme(); renderSubjects(); initExamCountdown(); var brandHome=document.getElementById('brandHome'); if(brandHome){ brandHome.addEventListener('click', function(){ resetHome(); }); } els.progressBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ if(state.subject && state.subject.short){ state.progressSubject=state.subject.short; } else if(!state.progressSubject){ state.progressSubject=(getAvailableSubjects()[0] ? getAvailableSubjects()[0].short : 'PIICT'); } renderProgress(); }); if(els.authActionBtn) els.authActionBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ if(state.authUser) signOutGoogle(); else signInWithGoogle(); }); els.listQuizBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ renderQuestionListScreen('cuestionario'); }); els.listPracticeBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ renderQuestionListScreen('practicas'); }); if(els.listExam1Btn){ els.listExam1Btn.addEventListener('click', function(){ renderQuestionListScreen('examen1'); }); } els.listBackBtn.addEventListener('click', backSubject); els.listHomeBtn.addEventListener('click', resetHome); if(els.weakBackBtn) els.weakBackBtn.addEventListener('click', backSubject); if(els.weakHomeBtn) els.weakHomeBtn.addEventListener('click', resetHome); els.practiceRandomBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ startPracticeCase(null); }); els.practiceBackBtn.addEventListener('click', hidePracticePicker); var _resetBtn=document.getElementById('resetSubjectProgressBtn'); if(_resetBtn) _resetBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ var short=state.progressSubject || (state.subject&&state.subject.short); if(!short) return; if(window.confirm('¿Seguro que quieres borrar todo el registro de '+subjectDisplayByShort(short)+'? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.')) resetSubjectProgress(short); }); els.homeTopBtn.addEventListener('click', resetHome); els.homeBtn.addEventListener('click', resetHome); els.subjectBtn.addEventListener('click', backSubject); els.repeatBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ startMode(state.mode); }); els.nextBtn.addEventListener('click', nextQuestion); els.exitBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ if(window.confirm('¿Salir de la sesión? Perderás el progreso actual.')) resetHome(); }); els.themeBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleTheme); els.shareQuestionBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ var txt=buildQuestionShareText(); if(txt) shareText(txt); }); els.shareActivityBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ var txt=buildActivityShareText(); if(txt) shareText(txt); }); els.appHelpBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ showScreen('help'); }); els.helpBackBtn.addEventListener('click', resetHome); els.toggleInfoBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ els.sectionTag.style.display = els.sectionTag.style.display==='none' ? 'block' : 'none'; }); els.shareRegistryTopBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){ if(!state.progressSubject){ state.progressSubject=(state.subject && state.subject.short) ? state.subject.short : (getAvailableSubjects()[0] ? getAvailableSubjects()[0].short : 'PIICT'); } showScreen('share'); renderShareScreen(); }); bindProgressChartChips(); var _shareBack=document.getElementById('shareBackBtn'); if(_shareBack) _shareBack.addEventListener('click', function(){ renderProgress(); }); var _selAll=document.getElementById('selectAllMetricsBtn'); if(_selAll) _selAll.addEventListener('click', function(){ var boxes=document.querySelectorAll('#shareMetricGroups input[type=checkbox][data-share-key]'); for(var i=0;i0 && data.practicalCases && data.practicalCases.length; var html='
'; html+='
'; html+='

'; html+='

'; } if(hasCase){ html+='

Caso práctico ('+cfg.caseCount+' preguntas)

'; html+=''; } html+='
'; html+='
'; var panel=document.getElementById('customPickerPanel'); if(!panel) return; panel.innerHTML=html; panel.style.display='block'; if(els.practicePickerPanel) els.practicePickerPanel.style.display='none'; setTimeout(function(){ try{ panel.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); }catch(e){ panel.scrollIntoView(); } }, 50); document.getElementById('customBackBtn').addEventListener('click', hideCustomPicker); var sa=document.getElementById('customSelectAllBtn'); if(sa) sa.addEventListener('click', function(){ var ns=panel.querySelectorAll('input[data-sec]'); for(var i=0;i=0)?caseIdx:null; var bank=data.questionBank||[]; var secSet={}; for(var i=0;i0 && data.practicalCases && data.practicalCases.length){ var theCase = (typeof caseIdx==='number' && caseIdx>=0 && caseIdx0?diff:0; } function getPacificDateParts(date){ try{ var parts=new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA',{ timeZone:'America/Los_Angeles', year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit', hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit',hour12:false }).formatToParts(date||new Date()); var out={}; parts.forEach(function(part){ if(part.type!=='literal') out[part.type]=part.value; }); return out; }catch(e){ var d=date||new Date(); return { year:String(d.getUTCFullYear()), month:String(d.getUTCMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'), day:String(d.getUTCDate()).padStart(2,'0'), hour:String(d.getUTCHours()).padStart(2,'0'), minute:String(d.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2,'0'), second:String(d.getUTCSeconds()).padStart(2,'0') }; } } function getQuotaWindowInfo(){ var now=new Date(); var parts=getPacificDateParts(now); var dayKey=[parts.year,parts.month,parts.day].join('-'); var probe=new Date(now.getTime()); probe.setSeconds(0,0); var limit=24*60+5; for(var i=0;i=100){ alertHtml='
⚠️ Límite diario estimado completado. La barra se reiniciará cuando cambie el día de Firebase. Reinicio previsto: '+esc(quota.resetLabel)+'.
'; }else if(quota.percent>=80){ alertHtml='
⚠️ Uso alto de escrituras. Quedan '+esc(String(quota.remaining))+' de '+esc(String(quota.limit))+' antes del reinicio previsto a las '+esc(quota.resetLabel)+'.
'; } return '' +'
' + '
Escrituras estimadas de Firebase hoy
Contador estimado de la app. Se reinicia cuando cambia el día de Firebase.
'+esc(quota.percent.toFixed(1))+'%
' + '
' + '
Usadas: '+esc(String(quota.used))+' / '+esc(String(quota.limit))+'Restantes: '+esc(String(quota.remaining))+'Reinicio previsto: '+esc(quota.resetLabel)+'
' + alertHtml +'
'; } function recordGuestConnection(forceInactive){ if(!window.db) return; try{ var authInst=(window.firebase && window.firebase.auth) ? window.firebase.auth() : null; if(authInst && authInst.currentUser) return; }catch(e){} try{ var meta=getGuestSessionMeta(); var visitorId=getGuestVisitorId(); var now=new Date().toISOString(); guestTracker.visitorId=visitorId; guestTracker.sessionId=meta.sessionId; guestTracker.startedAt=meta.startedAt; window.db.collection(GUEST_COLLECTION).doc(meta.sessionId).set({ type:'guest', visitorId: visitorId, sessionId: meta.sessionId, displayName: guestNameFromId(visitorId), startedAt: meta.startedAt, lastSeen: now, durationMs: guestDurationMs(meta.startedAt), ua: navigator.userAgent||'', activeNow: forceInactive ? false : true, convertedToAuth: false, lastPath: (location.hash||location.pathname||'').slice(0,120) },{merge:true}); noteEstimatedWrites(1); }catch(e){} } function markGuestSessionConverted(user){ if(!window.db || !user) return; try{ var meta=getGuestSessionMeta(); var sessionId=guestTracker.sessionId || (meta && meta.sessionId) || ''; var startedAt=guestTracker.startedAt || (meta && meta.startedAt) || ''; if(!sessionId) return; window.db.collection(GUEST_COLLECTION).doc(sessionId).set({ visitorId: guestTracker.visitorId || getGuestVisitorId(), sessionId: sessionId, startedAt: startedAt || new Date().toISOString(), lastSeen: new Date().toISOString(), durationMs: guestDurationMs(startedAt), activeNow: false, convertedToAuth: true, convertedAt: new Date().toISOString(), authUid: user.uid || '', authEmail: user.email || '', displayName: user.displayName || user.email || 'Usuario autenticado' },{merge:true}); noteEstimatedWrites(1); }catch(e){} } function bindGuestListeners(){ if(guestTracker.listenersBound) return; guestTracker.listenersBound=true; window.addEventListener('visibilitychange',function(){ if(document.visibilityState==='visible') recordGuestConnection(false); else recordGuestConnection(true); }); window.addEventListener('focus',function(){ recordGuestConnection(false); }); window.addEventListener('pagehide',function(){ recordGuestConnection(true); }); window.addEventListener('beforeunload',function(){ recordGuestConnection(true); }); } function startGuestTracking(){ if(guestTracker.active) return; guestTracker.active=true; bindGuestListeners(); recordGuestConnection(false); guestTracker.interval=setInterval(function(){ recordGuestConnection(false); },180000); } function stopGuestTracking(skipFinalWrite){ if(guestTracker.interval){ clearInterval(guestTracker.interval); guestTracker.interval=null; } if(guestTracker.active && !skipFinalWrite) recordGuestConnection(true); guestTracker.active=false; } /* ── estilos del panel ── */ var style=document.createElement('style'); style.textContent=[ '#adminFab{position:fixed;bottom:14px;right:14px;z-index:9999;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;border:none;background:#dc2626;color:#fff;font-size:16px;font-weight:900;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(220,38,38,.4);cursor:pointer;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;line-height:1;transition:all .18s;}', '#adminFab:hover{transform:scale(1.08);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(220,38,38,.55);}', '#adminOverlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:10000;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:12px;backdrop-filter:blur(4px);--panel:var(--card,#fff);--panel2:var(--paper-2,#f3ece1);--text:var(--ink,#1a1530);--muted:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);--accent:var(--p1,#ff7a59);--accent2:var(--p3,#8b5cf6);--accent-rgb:255,122,89;--accent-soft:color-mix(in oklab,var(--p1,#ff7a59) 15%,transparent);--ok:#16a34a;--okbg:rgba(22,163,74,.12);--warn:#d97706;--warnbg:rgba(217,119,6,.12);--bad:#dc2626;--badbg:rgba(220,38,38,.12);--shadow-sm:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.06);}', '.dark #adminOverlay{--panel:var(--card,#1a1634);--panel2:var(--paper-2,#141127);}', '#adminOverlay.open{display:flex;}', '#adminModal{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:22px;width:min(820px,100%);max-height:90dvh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.45);}', '#adminHead{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:16px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);flex-shrink:0;}', '#adminHead h3{margin:0;font-family:"Outfit",sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:800;}', '#adminHead small{color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;display:block;margin-top:2px;}', '#adminClose{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--panel2);color:var(--text);font-size:17px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .15s;}', '#adminClose:hover{background:var(--badbg);color:var(--bad);}', /* tabs */ '#adminTabs{display:flex;gap:4px;padding:12px 22px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);flex-shrink:0;}', '.admin-tab{padding:8px 16px;border-radius:10px 10px 0 0;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;margin-bottom:-1px;}', '.admin-tab:hover{color:var(--text);}', '.admin-tab.active{color:var(--accent);border-bottom-color:var(--accent);background:var(--panel2);}', '#adminBody{overflow-y:auto;padding:18px 22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;flex:1;}', /* gate */ '.admin-gate{display:grid;gap:12px;max-width:340px;margin:0 auto;}', '.admin-gate input{width:100%;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:14px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);background:var(--panel2);color:var(--text);font-size:15px;outline:none;text-align:center;letter-spacing:8px;}', '.admin-gate input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}', '.admin-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end;}', '.admin-error{font-size:12px;color:var(--bad);min-height:16px;text-align:center;}', /* summary row */ '.admin-summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:10px;}', '.admin-box{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:14px;background:var(--panel2);}', '.admin-box .abox-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--muted);}', '.admin-box .abox-val{font-family:"Outfit",sans-serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);margin-top:4px;}', /* user cards */ '.auc{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;background:var(--panel2);overflow:hidden;transition:box-shadow .15s;}', '.auc:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.1);}', '.auc-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:14px 16px;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;}', '.auc-avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-weight:800;font-size:15px;flex-shrink:0;}', '.auc-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}', '.auc-name{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}', '.auc-email{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}', '.auc-stats{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}', '.auc-stat{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap;}', '.auc-stat strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:700;}', '.auc-toggle{font-size:11px;color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;border:none;background:transparent;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;transition:background .15s;}', '.auc-toggle:hover{background:var(--accent-soft);}', /* user detail / subject table */ '.auc-detail{display:none;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding:14px 16px;}', '.auc-detail.open{display:block;}', '.subj-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12.5px;}', '.subj-table th{text-align:left;padding:6px 8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}', '.subj-table td{padding:7px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}', '.subj-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}', '.subj-table tr:hover td{background:var(--panel);}', /* user history inside detail */ '.user-history{margin-top:12px;}', '.user-history h5{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;}', '.hist-row{display:flex;gap:8px;font-size:12px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);align-items:center;}', '.hist-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}', '.hist-mode{background:var(--accent-soft);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 7px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}', /* connections tab */ '.conn-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}', '.conn-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}', '.conn-time{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);min-width:110px;flex-shrink:0;}', '.conn-user{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;flex:1;min-width:0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}', '.conn-dev{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:200px;}', /* misc */ '.dot{display:inline-block;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#6b7280;margin-right:6px;vertical-align:middle;flex-shrink:0;}', '.dot.on{background:#16a34a;}.dot.rec{background:#d97706;}', '.admin-msg{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;text-align:center;padding:24px;}', '.admin-refresh{float:right;font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;border:none;background:transparent;font-weight:600;}', '.admin-refresh:hover{text-decoration:underline;}', '.quota-card{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:14px;background:var(--panel);display:grid;gap:10px;}', '.quota-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;}', '.quota-percent{font-family:"Outfit",sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);white-space:nowrap;}', '.quota-bar{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--panel2);border:1px solid var(--line);overflow:hidden;}', '.quota-bar-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));border-radius:999px;transition:width .2s ease;}', '.quota-meta{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);}', '.quota-alert{border-radius:12px;padding:10px 12px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45;border:1px solid var(--line);}', '.quota-alert.warn{background:var(--warnbg);color:var(--warn);border-color:rgba(217,119,6,.28);}', '.quota-alert.danger{background:var(--badbg);color:var(--bad);border-color:rgba(220,38,38,.28);}', '.score-pill{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:999px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;}', '.sp-ok{background:var(--okbg);color:var(--ok)}.sp-warn{background:var(--warnbg);color:var(--warn)}.sp-bad{background:var(--badbg);color:var(--bad)}.sp-muted{background:var(--panel);color:var(--muted)}' ].join(''); document.head.appendChild(style); var adminVisualStyle=document.createElement('style'); adminVisualStyle.textContent=[ '#adminOverlay{padding:22px;background:rgba(2,6,23,.58);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);}', '#adminModal{width:min(1180px,100%);max-height:92dvh;border-radius:28px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.22);box-shadow:0 30px 120px rgba(2,6,23,.38);}', '#adminHead{padding:22px 26px 18px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--panel2),var(--panel));}', '#adminHead h3{font-size:28px;line-height:1.05;}', '#adminHead small{font-size:13px;margin-top:6px;}', '#adminClose{width:38px;height:38px;font-size:20px;background:var(--panel);}', '#adminTabs{gap:10px;padding:14px 26px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--panel);}', '.admin-tab{padding:12px 18px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--panel);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0;}', '.admin-tab.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:transparent;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.28);}', '#adminBody{padding:24px 26px 28px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--panel),var(--paper,#fbf7f2));}', '.admin-page{display:grid;gap:18px;}', '.admin-kpi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:14px;}', '.admin-kpi{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:22px;padding:18px;background:var(--panel);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}', '.admin-kpi-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);}', '.admin-kpi-value{font-family:"Outfit",sans-serif;font-size:34px;font-weight:800;line-height:1.05;margin-top:8px;color:var(--text);}', '.admin-kpi-sub{margin-top:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.45;}', '.admin-two-col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.3fr) minmax(280px,.7fr);gap:18px;align-items:start;}', '.admin-section-card{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:24px;background:var(--panel);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);overflow:hidden;}', '.admin-section-head{padding:18px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;}', '.admin-section-head h4{margin:0;font-family:"Outfit",sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:800;}', '.admin-section-head .sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.45;}', '.admin-section-body{padding:18px 20px;}', '.admin-stack{display:grid;gap:14px;}', '.admin-mini-list{display:grid;gap:10px;}', '.admin-mini-item{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:13px 14px;border-radius:16px;background:var(--panel2);border:1px solid var(--line);font-size:13px;}', '.admin-mini-item strong{font-size:18px;font-family:"Outfit",sans-serif;}', '.admin-day-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;padding:4px 4px 0;}', '.admin-list{display:grid;gap:12px;}', '.admin-entry{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:22px;background:var(--panel);padding:16px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}', '.admin-entry-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;}', '.admin-entry-name{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;font-family:"Outfit",sans-serif;line-height:1.2;}', '.admin-entry-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.45;word-break:break-word;}', '.admin-state{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:999px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;white-space:nowrap;}', '.admin-state.ok{background:var(--okbg);color:var(--ok);}', '.admin-state.warn{background:var(--warnbg);color:var(--warn);}', '.admin-state.muted{background:var(--panel2);color:var(--muted);}', '.admin-detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:14px;}', '.admin-chip-box{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;background:var(--panel2);padding:12px 13px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--muted);}', '.admin-chip-box strong{display:block;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px;font-weight:800;}', '.admin-context{margin-top:12px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:12px 13px;background:var(--panel);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--muted);word-break:break-word;}', '.admin-context b{color:var(--text);}', '.admin-users-grid{display:grid;gap:14px;}', '.auc{border-radius:22px;background:var(--panel);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}', '.auc-header{padding:16px 18px;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;}', '.auc-avatar{width:42px;height:42px;font-size:16px;}', '.auc-name{font-size:17px;font-family:"Outfit",sans-serif;font-weight:800;}', '.auc-email{font-size:12px;margin-top:4px;}', '.auc-stats{gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;}', '.auc-stat{padding:8px 10px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--panel2);border:1px solid var(--line);font-size:11px;}', '.auc-detail{padding:0 18px 18px;border-top:none;}', '.user-history{margin-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding-top:14px;}', '.hist-row{padding:9px 0;}', '.quota-card{border-radius:24px;padding:18px;background:var(--panel);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}', '.quota-head{align-items:center;}', '.quota-percent{font-size:38px;}', '.quota-bar{height:14px;background:var(--panel2);}', '.quota-meta{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:10px;font-size:13px;}', '.quota-meta span{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:11px 12px;background:var(--panel2);}', '.admin-empty{padding:26px;border:1px dashed var(--line);border-radius:20px;background:var(--panel2);font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;}', '.admin-note{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:20px;background:var(--panel2);padding:16px;font-size:13px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--muted);}', '.conn-row{display:block;padding:0;border-bottom:none;}', '@media (max-width:980px){.admin-two-col{grid-template-columns:1fr;}#adminModal{width:min(980px,100%);}#adminHead h3{font-size:23px;}}', '@media (max-width:700px){#adminOverlay{padding:10px;}#adminModal{max-height:96dvh;border-radius:22px;}#adminHead{padding:18px 16px 14px;}#adminTabs{padding:12px 16px;overflow:auto;}#adminBody{padding:18px 16px 22px;}.admin-kpi-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.admin-entry-name{font-size:16px;}.quota-percent{font-size:28px;}}' ].join(''); document.head.appendChild(adminVisualStyle); /* ── OPTION A — Clean dashboard styles ── */ var adminOptAStyle=document.createElement('style'); adminOptAStyle.textContent=[ '.a-kpis{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px;}', '@media (max-width:700px){.a-kpis{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}', '.a-kpi{background:var(--card,#fff);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:16px 18px;}', '.a-kpi .l{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;}', '.a-kpi .v{font-size:32px;font-weight:800;margin-top:4px;line-height:1;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);}', '.a-kpi .s{font-size:12px;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 50%,transparent);margin-top:4px;}', '.a-kpi.hl{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--p1,#ff7a59),var(--p3,#8b5cf6));color:#fff;border:0;}', '.a-kpi.hl .l,.a-kpi.hl .s{color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);}', '.a-kpi.hl .v{color:#fff;}', '.a-quota{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:12px 16px;background:var(--paper-2,#f3ece1);border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:20px;font-size:13px;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);flex-wrap:wrap;}', '.a-quota .bar{flex:1;height:6px;background:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 10%,transparent);border-radius:99px;overflow:hidden;min-width:140px;}', '.a-quota .bar>i{display:block;height:100%;background:#22c55e;border-radius:99px;transition:width .3s;}', '.a-quota.warn .bar>i{background:#f59e0b;}', '.a-quota.danger .bar>i{background:#ef4444;}', '.a-users-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin:20px 0 10px;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}', '.a-users-head h3{margin:0;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);}', '.a-search{background:var(--paper-2,#f3ece1);border:0;padding:9px 14px;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;width:240px;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);font-family:inherit;}', '.a-search:focus{outline:2px solid var(--p3,#8b5cf6);outline-offset:1px;}', '.a-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:40px 1fr auto auto auto auto 20px;gap:14px;align-items:center;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;margin-bottom:8px;background:var(--card,#fff);cursor:pointer;transition:transform .12s,box-shadow .12s,border-color .12s;}', '.a-row:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-color:var(--p3,#8b5cf6);}', '.a-avatar{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--p1,#ff7a59),var(--p3,#8b5cf6));color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;}', '.a-info{min-width:0;}', '.a-info .n{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}', '.a-info .e{font-size:12px;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}', '.a-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;flex-shrink:0;}', '.a-dot.on{background:#22c55e;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(34,197,94,.18);}', '.a-dot.rec{background:#f59e0b;}', '.a-dot.off{background:#cbd5e1;}', '.a-stat{text-align:right;min-width:70px;}', '.a-stat .lbl{font-size:10px;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;font-weight:700;}', '.a-stat .val{font-weight:800;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);}', '.a-when{font-size:12px;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 50%,transparent);min-width:80px;text-align:right;}', '.a-caret{color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 35%,transparent);font-size:18px;text-align:center;}', '@media (max-width:900px){.a-row{grid-template-columns:40px 1fr auto;}.a-row .a-stat:nth-of-type(2),.a-row .a-stat:nth-of-type(3),.a-row .a-when,.a-row .a-caret{display:none;}}', /* User detail modal */ '#userDetailOverlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:10001;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;backdrop-filter:blur(6px);}', '#userDetailOverlay.open{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .2s ease;}', '@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}', '#userDetailModal{background:var(--card,#fff);border-radius:22px;width:min(880px,100%);max-height:90dvh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.35);animation:slideUp .25s cubic-bezier(.2,.9,.3,1);}', '@keyframes slideUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}', '.ud-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:22px 26px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}', '.ud-avatar{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--p1,#ff7a59),var(--p3,#8b5cf6));color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:20px;}', '.ud-title{flex:1;min-width:0;}', '.ud-title h3{margin:0;font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}', '.ud-title .em{font-size:13px;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);margin-top:2px;word-break:break-all;}', '.ud-close{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--paper-2,#f3ece1);color:var(--ink,#1a1530);font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;}', '.ud-close:hover{background:rgba(220,38,38,.12);color:#dc2626;}', '.ud-body{overflow-y:auto;padding:22px 26px 26px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px;}', '.ud-kpis{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;}', '@media (max-width:600px){.ud-kpis{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}', '.ud-kpi{background:var(--paper-2,#f3ece1);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;}', '.ud-kpi .l{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;}', '.ud-kpi .v{font-size:24px;font-weight:800;margin-top:2px;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);}', '.ud-section h4{margin:0 0 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;}', '.ud-subj-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px;}', '.ud-subj-table th{text-align:left;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);font-weight:700;}', '.ud-subj-table td{padding:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--ink,#1a1530);}', '.ud-subj-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:0;}', '.ud-hist-row{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);font-size:13px;}', '.ud-hist-row:last-child{border:0;}', '.ud-hist-mode{background:color-mix(in oklab,var(--p3,#8b5cf6) 15%,transparent);color:var(--p3,#8b5cf6);border-radius:6px;padding:3px 8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}', '.ud-hist-subj{font-weight:600;flex:1;min-width:0;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);}', '.ud-hist-stats{font-size:12px;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);}', '.ud-hist-date{font-size:11px;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 50%,transparent);margin-left:8px;}', '.ud-empty{padding:24px;text-align:center;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 50%,transparent);font-size:13px;border:1px dashed var(--line);border-radius:12px;}', /* Connections & Guests clean rows */ '.day-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin:18px 0 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 55%,transparent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;}', '.day-header::before{content:"";height:1px;flex:0 0 24px;background:var(--line);}', '.day-header::after{content:"";height:1px;flex:1;background:var(--line);}', '.day-header .count{background:var(--paper-2,#f3ece1);color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 70%,transparent);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:99px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.02em;text-transform:none;}', '.c-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:40px 1fr auto auto auto auto;gap:14px;align-items:center;padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:6px;background:var(--card,#fff);}', '.fb-chip{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:99px;background:color-mix(in oklab,var(--p1,#ff7a45) 12%,transparent);color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--p1,#ff7a45) 85%,var(--ink,#1a1530));white-space:nowrap;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}', '.fb-chip.warn{background:rgba(239,68,68,.14);color:#dc2626;}', '.c-row .a-when,.c-row .a-info{min-width:0;}', '.c-device{font-size:13px;color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 70%,transparent);white-space:nowrap;}', '.c-time{font-family:"Outfit",sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink,#1a1530);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}', '.c-pill{display:inline-block;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:99px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;}', '.c-pill.ok{background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);color:#15803d;}', '.c-pill.muted{background:var(--paper-2,#f3ece1);color:color-mix(in oklab,var(--ink,#1a1530) 60%,transparent);}', '.c-pill.live{background:rgba(239,68,68,.14);color:#dc2626;position:relative;padding-left:18px;}', '.c-pill.live::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:7px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:6px;height:6px;background:#dc2626;border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 1.6s infinite;}', '@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(-50%) scale(1)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:translateY(-50%) scale(1.4)}}', '@media (max-width:800px){.c-row{grid-template-columns:40px 1fr auto auto;}.c-row .c-device,.c-row .c-time{display:none;}}', '.g-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:40px 1fr auto auto auto auto auto;gap:14px;align-items:center;padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid }); var currentUsers=[]; var isUnlocked=false; var currentTab='users'; document.getElementById('adminClose').addEventListener('click',function(){ overlay.classList.remove('open'); }); overlay.addEventListener('click',function(e){ if(e.target===overlay) overlay.classList.remove('open'); }); /* ── TAB SWITCHING ── */ overlay.addEventListener('click',function(e){ var btn=e.target.closest('.admin-tab'); if(!btn) return; currentTab=btn.dataset.tab; document.querySelectorAll('.admin-tab').forEach(function(t){ t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.tab===currentTab); }); if(currentTab==='users') loadUsersTab(); else if(currentTab==='connections') loadConnectionsTab(); else if(currentTab==='guests') loadGuestsTab(); }); /* ── HELPERS ── */ function rel(iso){ if(!iso) return 'nunca'; var d=new Date(iso), diff=Date.now()-d; if(diff<60000) return 'ahora mismo'; if(diff<3600000) return Math.floor(diff/60000)+' min'; if(diff<86400000) return Math.floor(diff/3600000)+' h'; if(diff<7*86400000) return Math.floor(diff/86400000)+' días'; return d.toLocaleDateString('es-ES'); } function fullDate(iso){ if(!iso) return '-'; return new Date(iso).toLocaleString('es-ES',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'2-digit',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}); } function dotCls(iso){ if(!iso) return ''; var d=Date.now()-new Date(iso); if(d<30*60000) return 'on'; if(d<86400000) return 'rec'; return ''; } function esc(s){ return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>'); } function initials(name){ return String(name||'?').slice(0,1).toUpperCase(); } function scorePill(v){ if(typeof v!=='number') return '-'; var cls=v>=6?'sp-ok':v>=5?'sp-warn':'sp-bad'; return ''+v.toFixed(2)+''; } function statePillHtml(label, type){ return ''+esc(label||'')+''; } function kpiCard(label, value, sub){ return '
'+esc(label)+'
'+value+'
'+(sub?'
'+sub+'
':'')+'
'; } function adminSection(title, subtitle, body, extra){ return '

'+esc(title)+'

'+(subtitle?'
'+subtitle+'
':'')+'
'+(extra||'')+'
'+body+'
'; } function dayLabelEs(day, suffix){ var label=day==='sin-fecha'?'Sin fecha':new Date(day+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('es-ES',{weekday:'long',day:'2-digit',month:'long',year:'numeric'}); return '
'+esc(label)+(suffix?' '+suffix+'':'')+'
'; } function deviceShort(ua){ if(!ua) return ''; if(/iPhone|iPad/.test(ua)) return '📱 iOS'; if(/Android/.test(ua)) return '📱 Android'; if(/Windows/.test(ua)) return '🖥 Windows'; if(/Macintosh|Mac OS/.test(ua)) return '🖥 Mac'; if(/Linux/.test(ua)) return '🖥 Linux'; return '🌐'; } function durationText(ms){ ms=Number(ms||0); if(ms<60000) return '< 1 min'; var mins=Math.round(ms/60000); if(mins<60) return mins+' min'; var h=Math.floor(mins/60), m=mins%60; return h+' h'+(m?(' '+m+' min'):''); } function guestIsActive(lastSeen){ if(!lastSeen) return false; return (Date.now()-new Date(lastSeen).getTime())<60000; } function subjectStats(prog, subKey){ var sub=(prog||{})[subKey]; if(!sub||!sub.overall||!sub.overall.sessions) return null; var ov=sub.overall; var answered=ov.answered||0; var acc=answered?(ov.correct/answered*100):0; /* exam stats */ var examBest=null, examSessions=0, examTotal=0; var examKeys=['examen','examen1','examenTotal']; for(var k=0;k' +kpiCard('Código', esc(code||'sin-código'),'') +kpiCard('Estado', 'Error','Firestore') +'' +'

var gmailEmails={}, guestIds={}; results[0].forEach(function(d){ var it=d.data()||{}; if((it.email||'')===ADMIN_EMAIL) return; if(it.email) gmailEmails[it.email]=1; }); results[1].forEach(function(d){ var it=d.data()||{}; if(it.convertedToAuth||it.authEmail) return; if(it.visitorId) guestIds[it.visitorId]=1; }); var nGmail=Object.keys(gmailEmails).length; var nGuest=Object.keys(guestIds).length; var total=nGmail+nGuest; activeCounter.querySelector('.num').textContent=total; activeCounter.classList.toggle('zero',total===0); activeCounter.title=total+' activos en últimos 2 min · '+nGmail+' con Gmail · '+nGuest+' invitado'+(nGuest===1?'':'s'); }catch(e){ try{ console.warn('ACTIVE_COUNTER_ERR',e); }catch(_){} } } function startActiveCounter(){ activeCounter.style.display='flex'; refreshActiveCounter(); if(activeTimer) clearInterval(activeTimer); activeTimer=setInterval(refreshActiveCounter,ACTIVE_POLL_MS); } function stopActiveCounter(){ activeCounter.style.display='none'; if(activeTimer){ clearInterval(activeTimer); activeTimer=null; } } /* ── AUTH LISTENER ── */ function attachAuthListener(){ if(window.firebase && window.firebase.auth){ try{ var authInst=window.firebase.auth(); authInst.onAuthStateChanged(function(user){ var isAdmin=!!(user && user.email===ADMIN_EMAIL); isUnlocked=isAdmin; fab.style.display=isAdmin?'flex':'none'; if(!isAdmin){ overlay.classList.remove('open'); stopActiveCounter(); } else { startActiveCounter(); } if(user){ markGuestSessionConverted(user); stopGuestTracking(true); saveUserMeta(user); }else{ startGuestTracking(); } }); return true; }catch(e){} } return false; } if(!attachAuthListener()){ startGuestTracking(); var tries=0; var ticker=setInterval(function(){ tries++; if(attachAuthListener() || tries>30) clearInterval(ticker); },300); } })(); /* ========= PWA UPDATE HANDLER ========= */ (function(){ function createUpdateToast(registration){ if(document.getElementById('pwaUpdateToast')) return; var toast=document.createElement('div'); toast.id='pwaUpdateToast'; toast.className='pwa-update-toast'; toast.innerHTML='' +'
Nueva versión disponible
' +'
Se ha descargado una actualización de la app.
' +'
' +'' +'' +'
'; document.body.appendChild(toast); document.getElementById('pwaUpdateReloadBtn').addEventListener('click', function(){ if(registration && registration.waiting){ registration.waiting.postMessage({type:'SKIP_WAITING'}); }else{ window.location.reload(); } }); document.getElementById('pwaUpdateLaterBtn').addEventListener('click', function(){ toast.classList.remove('show'); }); requestAnimationFrame(function(){ toast.classList.add('show'); }); } if(!('serviceWorker' in navigator)) return; var refreshing=false; navigator.serviceWorker.addEventListener('controllerchange', function(){ if(refreshing) return; refreshing=true; window.location.reload(); }); window.addEventListener('load', function(){ navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js').then(function(registration){ if(registration.waiting){ createUpdateToast(registration); } registration.addEventListener('updatefound', function(){ var newWorker=registration.installing; if(!newWorker) return; newWorker.addEventListener('statechange', function(){ if(newWorker.state==='installed' && navigator.serviceWorker.controller){ createUpdateToast(registration); } }); }); }).catch(function(err){ console.log('SW no registrado:', err); }); }); })();
